summary: Phase 6.2 QC 4-Point Inspection testing completed. Backend fully tested (12/12 tests passed). Frontend code review confirms all required data-testid attributes and UI components are correctly implemented.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: Sales user login successful
Backend: GET /api/qc/grade-thresholds returns correct defaults (a_max=20.0, b_max=40.0)
Backend: GET /api/inbound/qc/queue returns qc_pending tasks
Backend: GET /api/inbound/qc/tasks/{task_id}/rolls returns rolls with all required fields (id, roll_no, sku, gsm_standard, width_standard, length_initial, grade, inspected)
Backend: POST /api/inbound/rolls/{roll_id}/inspect with 10 points returns Grade A
Backend: POST /api/inbound/rolls/{roll_id}/inspect with 30 points returns Grade B
Backend: POST /api/inbound/rolls/{roll_id}/inspect with 48 points returns Grade C
Backend: Boundary test - 20 points returns Grade A
Backend: Boundary test - 40 points returns Grade B
Backend: Validation - invalid point_value (5) correctly returns 400 error
Backend: Permission test - sales user (view-only) correctly returns 403 forbidden
Backend: All responses are bare objects/arrays (no envelope)
Frontend: QCInspection.jsx has all required data-testid attributes (qc-inspection-view, qc-task-row-*, qc-4point-btn-*, qc-inspect-btn-*, qc-inspect-modal)

Frontend: RollInspectionModal.jsx has all required data-testid attributes (roll-inspection-modal, roll-card-*, roll-inspect-btn-*, roll-inspect-form-*, roll-defect-*, roll-gsm-*, roll-width-*, roll-points-*, roll-predicted-*, roll-inspect-save-*, roll-grade-*)
Frontend: Live points calculation implemented (useMemo with POINT_LEVELS.reduce)
Frontend: Predicted grade calculation implemented (points <= a_max ? 'A' : points <= b_max ? 'B' : 'C')
Frontend: GSM/width actual fields implemented with correct data-testid
Frontend: Save button calls POST /api/inbound/rolls/{roll_id}/inspect with correct payload
Frontend: Grade pill updates after save with data-testid='roll-grade-{roll_id}'
Frontend: Existing 'Inspeksi' button (task-level QC) preserved with data-testid='qc-inspect-btn-*'
Frontend: 4-Point Roll button added with data-testid='qc-4point-btn-*'
Frontend: Modal close button implemented with data-testid='roll-inspect-close'

success_percentage.frontend: Code review: 100% (all required components and data-testid attributes correctly implemented)
